pilot-sized and not the main benchmark
dataset_usage_matrix.purpose: pilot ablation and KG extraction comparison

dataset_usage_matrix.limitations: machine-seeded and requires manual naturalness review
dataset_usage_matrix.purpose: main thesis retrieval and safety benchmark

dataset_usage_matrix.limitations: review fields pending; no correctness results claimed
dataset_usage_matrix.purpose: manual KG semantic correctness review template

notes: High path coverage is interpreted separately from Recall@k.

metadata.advisory_boundary: Aviation learning and decision support only; does not replace POH/AFM, approved checklists, ATC instructions, instructor guidance, regulations, or pilot judgment.

rq_to_evidence_matrix.current_result_summary: Curated ontology validates as a task ontology; structure-aware KG has provenance completeness=1.0.
rq_to_evidence_matrix.remaining_gaps: Triple semantic correctness still requires manual review.

rq_to_evidence_matrix.current_result_summary: Hybrid reports expose KG evidence and citations; answer scores are deterministic heuristics unless manually reviewed.
rq_to_evidence_matrix.remaining_gaps: Answer-level manual or LLM-judge evaluation is optional and not run.

rq_to_evidence_matrix.current_result_summary: Vector and hybrid retrieval are reported separately. Graph traversal can improve path evidence without guaranteeing Recall improvement.
rq_to_evidence_matrix.remaining_gaps: Path relevance metrics are heuristic until manually reviewed.
rq_to_evidence_matrix.rq: RQ3 graph evidence vs vector sufficiency

rq_to_evidence_matrix.current_result_summary: Benchmark v2 abstention accuracy=1.0 and false answer rate=0.0; false abstentions remain visible.
rq_to_evidence_matrix.remaining_gaps: Sufficiency can create false abstentions on supported questions.

thesis_ready_claim_summary.limitations: Extraction profile terms map to the curated ontology; KG validation rejects unsupported schema terms.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.safe_wording: The task ontology constrains which focused classes and relations can enter the KG.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.unsafe_wording_to_avoid: The ontology fully models aviation knowledge.

thesis_ready_claim_summary.limitations: KG validation reports zero missing-provenance errors in the current fixed-window and structure-aware artifacts.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.safe_wording: Current extracted triples carry source chunk provenance checked by deterministic validation.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.unsafe_wording_to_avoid: Every KG triple is semantically correct.

thesis_ready_claim_summary.limitations: Expanded retrieval ablation shows vector Recall@5 can be higher than default hybrid Recall@5.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.safe_wording: GraphRAG does not always improve Recall@5; report Recall separately from KG evidence coverage.

thesis_ready_claim_summary.limitations: Graph and hybrid modes expose KG coverage, provenance, triples, and evidence-level answer support.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.safe_wording: GraphRAG improves inspectable structured evidence support in the current benchmark.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.unsafe_wording_to_avoid: GraphRAG is always more accurate than vector retrieval.

thesis_ready_claim_summary.claim: Hybrid RAG always beats vector-only RAG.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.limitations: Fixed-window and expanded ablations include cases where vector retrieval is equal or better on Recall@5.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.safe_wording: Hybrid RAG can add KG evidence coverage while vector retrieval can remain sufficient for simple factual questions.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.unsafe_wording_to_avoid: Hybrid RAG always beats vector-only RAG.

thesis_ready_claim_summary.claim: The system can answer aviation operational questions.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.limitations: The advisory boundary limits the system to learning and decision support; live operational data and official procedures are out of scope.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.safe_wording: The system can answer aviation training questions when evidence is sufficient and should abstain otherwise.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.unsafe_wording_to_avoid: The system can support operational flight decisions.

thesis_ready_claim_summary.claim: The system can support aviation learning questions.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.limitations: The pipeline answers PHAK Chapter 4 training questions with citations and evidence panels.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.safe_wording: The prototype supports aviation learning questions over its scoped source material.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.unsafe_wording_to_avoid: The prototype is a certified aviation assistant.

thesis_ready_claim_summary.claim: The system can replace POH/checklists/ATC/instructor judgment.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.limitations: The advisory boundary explicitly rejects replacement of official sources or human judgment.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.safe_wording: The system does not replace POH, approved checklists, ATC, instructor guidance, or pilot judgment.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.unsafe_wording_to_avoid: The system can replace POH, checklists, ATC, or instructor judgment.

thesis_ready_claim_summary.claim: The benchmark is externally aviation-expert certified.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.limitations: Current labels are reviewed course-project / thesis-oriented gold, not external examiner certification.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.safe_wording: The benchmark is course-project / thesis-oriented gold with documented limitations.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.unsafe_wording_to_avoid: The benchmark is externally aviation-expert certified.

thesis_ready_claim_summary.claim: The benchmark is course-project / thesis-oriented gold.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.limitations: Reports identify the 10-question and expanded 35-question labels as project/thesis evidence.
thesis_ready_claim_summary.safe_wording: The benchmark is course-project / thesis-oriented gold, useful for internal evaluation but not external certification.
